name: Using LLMs to simulate students' responses to exam questions
venue: Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: EMNLP 2024
summary: Findings 2024 paper evaluating prompts that make LLMs answer exam questions as students at different skill levels across science and reading-comprehension datasets.

access_attempts.notes: ACL Anthology PDF is available and was used for skill-level simulation and accuracy extraction.
